_readme: Named macros for Neon Blonde / Sin Chonies. Each macro is a list of OSC operations run in order. 'unit' converts human values (see xair_map_describe). Edit freely or save new ones with xair_macro_save.

line_check_safe.description: Safe starting point for line check: all channel faders to -30dB, unmuted, LR master at -20dB, phantom untouched.

mute_all_inputs.description: Mute every input channel 1-16 (does not touch LR, buses or FX returns).

break_music.description: Set break: mute all inputs, unmute aux/USB return (ch 17/18 playback) and set it to -12dB into LR.

show_mode.description: Back from break: mute the aux/USB playback, unmute all inputs.

kill_fx.description: Panic: mute all 4 FX returns (kills reverb/delay tails instantly, e.g. for talking between songs).
